name: quality-gate
description: Single-plugin marketplace hosting the quality-gate skill. Install with: /plugin marketplace add Sitr3n01/quality_review && /plugin install quality-gate@quality-gate

plugins.name: quality-gate
plugins.description: Deterministic CI/CD quality gate. Use /quality-gate:check (run gate), /quality-gate:install (set up in this repo), /quality-gate:explain (read reports), /quality-gate:fix (minimal patch), /quality-gate:baseline (seed baseline on main).
